arts.ttl: Everton reach agreement to sign Lyon’s Ernest Nuamah
arts.sum: Another youngster could soon be on his way out of Olympique Lyonnais. The French club have reached an agreement to sell Ernest Nuamah (21) to Premier League side Everton during…

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich and Borussia Dortmund to go head-to-head for Lyon’s Rayan Cherki
arts.sum: According to Tobi Altschäffl and Christian Falk (via FT), Bayern Munich and Borussia Dortmund are both lining up a possible move for Olympique Lyonnais forward Rayan Cherki. As previously reported,…

arts.ttl: Everton reach agreement with Lyon for transfer of Ernest Nuamah
arts.sum: Everton’s attempts to sign Ernest Nuamah from Lyon had gone quiet over the past 24 hours or so, but it appears that just meant the Premier League club were working on reaching an agreement behind the scenes.
